The Devil Wears Prada 2.title: The Devil Wears Prada 2
The Devil Wears Prada 2.desc: As the formidable Miranda Priestly contemplates retirement, she unexpectedly joins forces with Andy Sachs. Their alliance forms to confront a new rival: Miranda's former assistant, Emily Charlton, who has become a formidable force.
The Devil Wears Prada 2.casts: Meryl Streep, Anne Hathaway, Emily Blunt, Stanley Tucci, Kenneth Branagh

Michael.title: Michael
Michael.desc: Antoine Fuqua directs a powerful exploration into the life and artistry of Michael Jackson, tracing his extraordinary path from childhood prodigy to global superstar. The film delves into the King of Pop’s relentless creative ambition and the profound impact of his music.
Michael.casts: Jaafar Jackson, Colman Domingo, Nia Long, Juliano Krue Valdi, KeiLyn Durrel Jones

Swapped.title: Swapped
Swapped.desc: A tiny woodland creature and a majestic bird switch bodies, thrusting them into an unexpected alliance. As they navigate unfamiliar forms, survival hinges on teamwork and wit.
Swapped.casts: Michael B. Jordan, Juno Temple, Tracy Morgan, Cedric the Entertainer, Justina Machado

Apex.title: Apex
Apex.desc: In the untamed Australian wilderness, a grieving woman on a solo expedition finds herself hunted by a ruthless killer. As she fights for survival, the line between predator and prey blurs. Will she outwit her pursuer or become another victim in the wild?
Apex.casts: Charlize Theron, Taron Egerton, Eric Bana, Caitlin Stasey, Bessie Holland

The Gates.title: The Gates
The Gates.desc: A road trip takes a dark turn for three friends when they witness a murder within a secluded gated community. Trapped inside, they quickly become the prey of its sinister residents.
The Gates.casts: Mason Gooding, Algee Smith, Keith Powers, James Van Der Beek, Brad Leland

Scream 7.title: Scream 7
Scream 7.desc: A new Ghostface terrorizes a quiet town, targeting Sidney Prescott’s daughter. As fear grips the community, Sidney confronts her haunted past to stop the killer.
Scream 7.casts: Neve Campbell, Courteney Cox, Isabel May, Jasmin Savoy Brown, Mason Gooding

Send Help.title: Send Help
Send Help.desc: Following a harrowing plane crash, two estranged colleagues find themselves marooned on a seemingly deserted island, forcing them to confront both their personal demons and the island's insidious secrets.
Send Help.casts: Rachel McAdams, Dylan O'Brien, Edyll Ismail, Dennis Haysbert, Xavier Samuel

Bad Men Must Bleed.title: Bad Men Must Bleed
Bad Men Must Bleed.desc: In a lawless frontier, a grieving young girl crosses paths with a notorious Civil War veteran called The Butcher after her family is slaughtered by the ruthless Harrison Griggs. As the outlaw’s grip on the town tightens, the pair’s uneasy alliance is tested by violence and betrayal.
Bad Men Must Bleed.casts: Chad Michael Murray, Willie Robertson, Bruce Dern, Zach Roerig, Lexi Rabe

Thrash.title: Thrash
Thrash.desc: A Category 5 hurricane strikes a coastal town, flooding the streets and unleashing a terrifying new threat. As survivors battle the storm, they must also evade the deadly sharks drawn to the chaos.
Thrash.casts: Phoebe Dynevor, Whitney Peak, Djimon Hounsou, Gemma Dart, Alyla Browne

Breaking Boundaries.title: Breaking Boundaries
Breaking Boundaries.desc: Nastasya Generalova, the sole Black rhythmic gymnast on Team USA, navigates intense training and cultural identity as she strives for Olympic qualification. Raised by her Russian mother, Olga, Nastasya finds herself at the intersection of two worlds.
Breaking Boundaries.casts: Nastasya Generalova, Joy Annabelle Womack, Irina Deryugina, Tatyana Itkina, William Parham

Bangalore Days.title: Bangalore Days
Bangalore Days.desc: Three spirited cousins, Divya, Krishnan, and Arjun, relocate to Bangalore, each chasing their own dreams and grappling with new realities. As they confront career challenges, personal relationships, and identity crises, their bond.
Bangalore Days.casts: Nazriya Nazim, Nivin Pauly, Dulquer Salmaan, Fahadh Faasil, Parvathy Thiruvothu

21 Up.title: 21 Up
21 Up.desc: This thought-provoking documentary follows a group of British individuals from childhood to adulthood, capturing their hopes, struggles, and transformations over two decades. As they reflect on life's twists, the film reveals how their paths diverge and intersect, leaving viewers contemplating destiny and.
21 Up.casts: Lynn Johnson, Tony Walker, Jacqueline Bassett, Charles Furneaux, Bruce Balden

Baraka.title: Baraka
Baraka.desc: Baraka captures the pulse of Earth through breathtaking imagery and haunting visuals. Without narration, it weaves nature, humanity, and spirituality into a seamless flow.

Gintama: The Final Chapter - Be Forever.title: Gintama: The Final Chapter - Be Forever Yorozuya
Gintama: The Final Chapter - Be Forever.desc: In a chaotic Edo where Gintoki's absence has altered history, the Yorozuya face their biggest challenge yet. Gintoki, now a ghost of the past, returns to save his friends and complete their final quest.
Gintama: The Final Chapter - Be Forever.casts: Tomokazu Sugita, Daisuke Sakaguchi, Rie Kugimiya, Akira Ishida, Susumu Chiba

Grand Illusion.title: Grand Illusion
Grand Illusion.desc: In the confines of a WWI German POW camp, French officers from starkly different social strata find their national unity tested by ingrained class prejudices.
Grand Illusion.casts: Jean Gabin, Pierre Fresnay, Erich von Stroheim, Marcel Dalio, Dita Parlo

Gustaakh Ishq.title: Gustaakh Ishq
Gustaakh Ishq.desc: In the bustling streets of Purani Delhi, a man fights to save his father's printing press while becoming a disciple of a revered poet. His growing love for the poet's daughter tests his loyalty and forces him to confront a life-altering choice.
Gustaakh Ishq.casts: Vijay Varma, Fatima Sana Shaikh, Naseeruddin Shah, Sharib Hashmi, Natasha Rastogi

Hasan Minhaj: Homecoming King.title: Hasan Minhaj: Homecoming King
Hasan Minhaj: Homecoming King.desc: Hasan Minhaj takes the stage to unpack his experiences as a first-generation Indian-American, weaving together tales of racial microaggressions and the unique pressures of immigrant parenting.

Aliens Expanded.title: Aliens Expanded
Aliens Expanded.desc: Aliens Expanded offers an extensive look at James Cameron’s iconic sci-fi film, revealing behind-the-scenes stories and creative breakthroughs. Featuring interviews with key cast members like Sigourney Weaver and Michael Biehn, it celebrates the film's enduring impact.
Aliens Expanded.casts: Sigourney Weaver, James Cameron, Michael Biehn, Gale Anne Hurd, Lance Henriksen

The Three Deaths of Marisela Escobedo.title: The Three Deaths of Marisela Escobedo
The Three Deaths of Marisela Escobedo.desc: Marisela Escobedo launches a relentless public campaign to bring her daughter's killer to justice after Mexican authorities fail to prosecute the case. Her courageous activism exposes systemic corruption and puts her own life in grave danger as she.
The Three Deaths of Marisela Escobedo.casts: Juan Manuel Fraire Escobedo, Alejandro Fraire, Blanca Escobedo, Patricia González, Ruth Fierro

Momentum Generation.title: Momentum Generation
Momentum Generation.desc: Set on Oahu's north shore, a group of teenage surfers like Kelly Slater and Shane Dorian revolutionize the sport in the 1990s. As fame grows, their bond faces intense pressure, revealing how ambition can threaten even the strongest.
Momentum Generation.casts: Kelly Slater, Taylor Knox, Ross Williams, Shane Dorian, Rob Machado

Blossoms - Back To Stockport.title: Blossoms - Back To Stockport
Blossoms - Back To Stockport.desc: Set in Stockport, this documentary follows indie band Blossoms as they gear up for a hometown concert at Edgeley Park. The film explores their creative process and personal stories, culminating in a powerful homecoming.
Blossoms - Back To Stockport.casts: Tom Ogden, Joe Donovan, Charlie Salt, Josh Dewhurst, Myles Kellock

The Lunatic Farmer.title: The Lunatic Farmer
The Lunatic Farmer.desc: State regulators target Joel Salatin’s unique farming practices at Polyface Farm. His faith and innovative methods clash with industrial norms. Can he preserve his vision for sustainable agriculture?

River&apos;s End: California&apos;s Late.title: River's End: California's Latest Water War
River&apos;s End: California&apos;s Late.desc: Set against California's arid landscapes, River's End exposes the fierce fight over the state's diminishing water resources. Delanna Studi guides viewers through political clashes, corporate interests, and community struggles that threaten future water security.

Racionais MC&apos;s: From the Streets of.title: Racionais MC's: From the Streets of São Paulo
Racionais MC&apos;s: From the Streets of.desc: The documentary Racionais MC's: From the Streets of São Paulo chronicles the rise of Brazil's most influential rap group from the city's peripheries to international acclaim.
Racionais MC&apos;s: From the Streets of.casts: Mano Brown, KL Jay, Ice Blue, Edi Rock, Ice-T

Rammstein in Amerika.title: Rammstein in Amerika
Rammstein in Amerika.desc: Rammstein returns to the US stage after a decade, delivering a powerful concert at Madison Square Garden. The film captures the band’s intense performance and fan connection.
Rammstein in Amerika.casts: Till Lindemann, Richard Kruspe, Paul Landers, Oliver Riedel, Christoph Schneider

Space MOMs.title: Space MOMs
Space MOMs.desc: A team of middle-class working mothers, who also happen to be brilliant rocket scientists, races to complete India's groundbreaking Mars Orbiter Mission. They juggle brutal work schedules with family responsibilities while attempting an unprecedented space achievement.
Space MOMs.casts: Anusha Nuthula, Trivikram Nallamshetty, Arjun Kolishetty, Bhavna Pani, Swati Das

Seaspiracy.title: Seaspiracy
Seaspiracy.desc: A filmmaker investigates the impact of human activity on ocean ecosystems and uncovers a disturbing global conspiracy. Featuring experts like Sylvia Earle and Richard O'Barry, the film reveals the dark side of marine.
Seaspiracy.casts: Ali Tabrizi, Sylvia Earle, Richard O'Barry, Paul de Gelder, Lucy Tabrizi

Chak De! India.title: Chak De! India
Chak De! India.desc: Set in the competitive world of field hockey, Chak De! India follows a disgraced former captain as he coaches a diverse team of girls striving for international glory.
Chak De! India.casts: Shah Rukh Khan, Vidya Malvade, Sagarika Ghatge, Shilpa Shukla, Chitrashi Rawat

Unicorn Town.title: Unicorn Town
Unicorn Town.desc: In Schwäbisch Hall, a small town football team battles against financial giants in European leagues. Their tight-knit culture and resilience face a test as the sport evolves.
Unicorn Town.casts: Nick Alfieri, Siegfried Gehrke, Devin Benton, Tyler Rutenbeck, Jordan Neuman

The Big City.title: The Big City
The Big City.desc: In Calcutta, a housewife from a traditional family takes a sales job, challenging her world and sparking personal growth. As her life shifts, she faces emotional struggles and societal expectations.
The Big City.casts: Madhabi Mukherjee, Anil Chatterjee, Haren Chatterjee, Haradhan Bandyopadhyay, Vicky Redwood
